authority.department: Department of Labour, Government of Maharashtra

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Maharashtra.

rules.title: Review Maharashtra Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Maharashtra Shops and Establishments (Regulation of Employment and Conditions of Service) Act is applicable to the establishment.

citations.reference: Maharashtra Shops and Establishments (Regulation of Employment and Conditions of Service) Act, 2017

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and notices prescribed under Maharashtra labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices, abstracts and employee information required under Maharashtra labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Maharashtra provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave, holidays and weekly offs.

rules.title: Review Maharashtra Professional Tax Compliance
rules.description: Determine whether Professional Tax registration, enrolment, deduction, return filing and payment obligations apply under Maharashtra law.

citations.reference: Maharashtra State Tax on Professions, Trades, Callings and Employments Act, 1975

rules.title: Review Maharashtra Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Maharashtra Labour Welfare Fund, including contribution requirements where applicable.

rules.title: Review Maharashtra Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications applicable in Maharashtra.

citations.reference: Government of Maharashtra Minimum Wage Notifications

rules.title: Monitor Maharashtra Labour Notifications
rules.description: Review labour department circulars, amendments, notifications and compliance updates issued by the Government of Maharashtra.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering labour registrations, professional tax, labour welfare fund, statutory records and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for licence renewals, labour inspections, professional tax returns and statutory due dates.
